clusters.justification: This domain encompasses the processing of emotional valence, physiological arousal, and mood states, reflecting the integrated function of the limbic-anterior insula-autonomic axis.

This domain represents the subjective assessment of outcomes, encompassing reward reinforcement, incentive salience, and goal-directed choice behavior driven by striatal-ventromedial prefrontal circuitry.

This domain captures internally directed representations of agents, seamlessly binding self-referential thought, autobiographical experience, and interpersonal mental state attribution typically subserved by the macroscopic default mode network.
